headline: 'Better Than Expected': Stock Market Update For The Week Ahead
summary:
The Past Week, In A Nutshell

What Happened: Last week ended positive alongside progress in stimulus talks.

headline: Barron's Picks And Pans: Alibaba, AllianceBernstein, Pfizer And More
summary:
This weekend's Barron's cover story discusses why the lagging industrials could be poised for a decade of outperformance.
	Other featured articles discuss how American manufacturing can be reinvigorated and the coming wave of consolidation in investment management.

headline: IPO Outlook: Solar Power Company Array Technologies, Chinese Retailer Miniso Lead Possible 9 IPO Week
summary: This week could see up to nine companies price their IPOs. Here is a look at the companies looking to go public this week.

headline: The Week Ahead In Biotech: J&J Earnings Kickstarts Pharma Earnings, More IPOs In The Pipeline
summary: Biotech stocks advanced along with the broader market in the week ended Oct. 9, although the news flow was quite light.

headline: Last Week's Notable Insider Buys: Element Solutions, Selecta Biosciences And More
summary:
Insider buying can be an encouraging signal for potential investors when markets face uncertainty.
	Insiders seemed to be focused on biotech companies last week.
	Initial public offerings and a SPAC merger encouraged insiders to buy shares.
